Product details

Web ID: 10502776

Polo Ralph Lauren's cotton sweater combines two of Polo's most iconic design details: a textural cable-knit motif and our signature Pony.

  • Product Features

    • Imported
    • Crewneck
    • Long sleeves with rib-knit cuffs
    • Rib-knit hem
    • Signature embroidered Pony at the left chest

  • Size & Fit

    • Approx. model height is 6'1" and he is wearing a size medium
    • Size medium is approx. 26-½" long
    • Regular Fit: wider at the chest while still maintaining a modern silhouette

  • Materials & Care

    • Machine wash
    • 100% cotton

  • Shipping & Returns

    • This item qualifies for Free Shipping with minimum purchase! exclusions & details
    • California and Minnesota customers call 1-800-289-6229 for Free Shipping information.
    • Returns are accepted at any Macy's store within 30 days from purchase date. Last Act items are final sale and sold "as is." No returns, exchanges, or price adjustments allowed.
    • For complete details, see our Shipping and Returns policies.
  • Have questions?
    Call or chat, our experts are here to help.
    1-800-BUY-MACY

    Ratings & Reviews

    Here's what customers think
    • The cable knit cotton sweater is a well-made classic with a mixed reception
    • Many customers praised its soft, comfortable, and stylish design, describing it as a great wardrobe staple
    • Some reported issues with the fit, stating it ran large or was too baggy
    • A few customers were disappointed with the quality, noting the material felt thin or the sweater stretched out after wear
    • The actual color may also differ from the product images

    issavib3
    20 days ago

    Do not waste your money

    Very poor quality. I was highly disappointed in this purchase. The material felt very thin and you can actually see through the sweater. It runs a bit small.

    Customer review from Ralph Lauren

    External reviewer
    1 month ago

    Awesome sweater

    Really like the color and style

    Recommends this product

    Customer review from Ralph Lauren

    Daryl
    1 month ago

    Pairs with everything

    I recently picked up this navy blue cable knit Polo sweater and it’s easily a new favorite. Being 100% cotton, it has a great weight to it feels high-quality and substantial without being itchy like wool. The cable knit pattern is deep and well-defined, giving it a really classic, premium look. The navy color is rich and pairs perfectly with everything from jeans to chinos. Highly recommend for anyone looking for a timeless piece that’s actually comfortable for all-day wear."

    Recommends this product

    Customer review from Ralph Lauren

    Beautiful and Classy
